title: Totem Pets
description: A Texture Pack that Make its so When you name a totem to the name of a mob in the game it will Change the model to that of said mob!
body:
Totem Pets! --- Totem Pets is a texture pack made for those who want a Minecraft mob as their totem! By renaming a Totem of undying In a anvil to one of the names in the description, it will change the model and texture to be a mob! ---

--- ![New! ](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/vl0wdrxvruayar0smuuok/2026-03-16_21.43.37_3.png?rlkey=23qgejip7ycx3d69x0c7mj3ac&st=s19j35im&dl=1) --- Also note this packs is a work in progress. i aim to add every mob in the game to this pack --- You need the mods [CitReswen](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [optifine](https://optifine.net/home) For Every version before 1.21.5 this pack will work for every version after 1.21.5 without these mods
Totem names

Also Please Note all names must to be in Lowercase letters

wolfs

![Dogs](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/lt4rdo5bc5r8ol6hg3bum/Dogs.png?rlkey=gcwlp1ray8m4wbz4uw01lszsf&st=xpl369vu&dl=1)
